content:
Hello, Admin! Can you please post this?
Hi! I just want to ask if there’s already a group chat for BTLEd Industrial Arts – Day class. If there is, please add me. Thank you so much!

Hi syug, (from CTU-MC) to those who are already enrolled in BIT-CT Day I-B1, is there already a GC? Classes are about to start and I still don’t have even one group chat. I’m gonna die from being left behind 😭 please add me.

Hi admin, this is a dummy account of my friend but I hope you can post this. I’m a 2nd year Engineering student from CTU Danao. While enrolling with my classmate, I saw a girl coming out of the restroom. She was really cute 😭 the way she smiled and moved was so adorable. I don’t know her, but I saw her ID. I’m not sure if there’s a school called MULAO NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL, but that was on her ID. The only thing I remember is her first name: JORYZA. She’s really beautiful admin, and her voice was so nice because she kept singing while coming out of the CR. I hope she got into CTU Danao. Please hide my identity admin 🥰 I hope someone comments or tags her so I can add her on Facebook. Maybe she’s the one I’ll introduce to my mom someday 😭
Hi everyone good evening!!! I’m looking for a CTU female uniform. Maybe you know someone who already graduated or is selling theirs. Just DM me because I really need one. THANK YOU!

Good day! I’m overwhelmed and struggling to cope, and I don’t know where else to turn for support. I’ve been dealing with a lot of pain and sorrow in my life, and it’s hard to express it all.

Growing up, my family made me feel like a burden. I wanted to become a working student to support myself, but they never allowed me because no one would do the household chores. A friend once offered to help me apply for a job, but my family stopped me.

They constantly throw hurtful words at me and make me feel indebted for my life and education. My sister looks down on me and calls me ambitious when all I want is to graduate and escape this toxic environment.

Whenever my siblings hurt me, I’m not allowed to defend myself. If I do, my mother scolds me even more. My classmates judge me, my neighbors insult me, and I barely have enough money for school expenses.

I’ve always studied hard and tried to stay on the dean’s list because it’s the only thing that gives me comfort. But even my relatives belittle me.

Right now, I’m searching for online jobs to support myself. Sometimes I wonder why I even exist when life has only shown me pain. I’m not asking for sympathy. I just need to release this burden because everything feels too heavy.

Hi PTPA (please post anonymously hihi). I’m a freshman and I just wanted to ask if CTU Main has a dance group, and if they hold auditions every school year because I want to join 😅 Also, is there an organization or publication in CTU where we can submit poems? Thank youuu!

Hi admin! I don’t know where to rant about this so I’ll just post here. What’s the update on the PATHFIT uniforms for students who reserved last September, especially size large? It’s almost been a year and there’s still no solution? This is already our last year of PATHFIT and we still haven’t received the uniforms we already paid for!

Hello admin please hide my identity. I was wondering during enrollment if I can still continue to second year through online enrollment even though I failed a major subject 😭 What’s the process for this kind of situation? Please help.

I need help. I’m about to enter first year college and I’m still undecided on which course to take. Which is more manageable: Bachelor of Elementary Education (BEED) or Bachelor of Secondary Education major in Math (BSED-Math)? I know college is hard, but I want something I can handle. Please help 😭 thank youuu. *CTU-Naga*

Hi ma’am/sir, I don’t know the names of the people handling each organization, that’s why I’m posting here. I’d like to ask if your orgs are interested in collaborating regarding uniforms. You can visit our page “KUGEE ACTIVEWEAR CEBU.” I assure you the quality is worth it ☺ Or just message my Facebook account “ROMEO SINGSON.” Thank you!

Hi admin, this isn’t a confession huhu. CTU students looking for a uniform swap please 😭 I bought one from SSG but got the wrong size. Mine is size S and I want to swap for M. I only fitted it once but I gained weight so the pants no longer fit 😭 Preferably from someone who also bought from SSG.

Hello SSG or whoever handles the events, I just want to suggest that future activities should include a Random Play Dance for K-Pop or P-Pop fans and dancers from CTU 😭 Earlier we were just lying in the gym bored. I hope this gets approved Miss SSG President. Thank you!

Please let me rant 😭 To all irregular students out there, please give me tips on how to survive. It’s only the second day but I’m already planning to quit. I don’t know anyone. I’m first year but my classmates are mostly second years. The other freshmen already know each other because they came from the same schools. Nobody talks to me 😭 I feel so down. I want to cry. I have no one to talk to or ask about class.

Hi admin. Last night I saw Midnight Band perform, which I heard is affiliated with the Guidance Evening Council. They were amazing! 🎶 Even though it was raining and they seemed to have technical problems, they still genuinely enjoyed performing and it was inspiring to watch. I’d love to join them someday, so I want to know more about them and how to audition or apply. If anyone has info about their official name, contact person, or requirements, please let me know 🙏

Hello. I’m taking a Literature course so please understand if this is long 😭 Yesterday I lined up for lanyards early in the morning. Around 10 AM it started raining and I didn’t bring an umbrella. Suddenly, the boys behind me extended their umbrella over me so I wouldn’t get wet. They even shared one jacket among themselves while keeping me dry.

I kept looking back because I thought maybe it was accidental, but no — they intentionally sheltered me, a stranger. I wanted to say thank you but I was too shy.

Later, when their friends arrived and wanted to buy lanyards too, I repaid their kindness by offering them one of my reservation slots.

Thank you so much to those boys. You made my day and made me feel less alone in school. PS: I’ll always bring an umbrella now 😭
-Iesha

WHY IS THE LANYARD RESTOCK TAKING SO LONG 😭 WE’RE DYING WAITING SSG PLEASE DO SOMETHING.
- BSME Freshman

Hi admin please hide my identity. I’m a freshman from COT and during the orientation there was a girl from ROTC who caught my attention 😭 She was bubbly and cute and kept entertaining us so we wouldn’t get bored. I really admire the way she talks and communicates. She asked us if we were joining ROTC and I asked her if I could survive it. She said: “If I can do it even though I’m a girl, then you definitely can because you’re a guy.” That really inspired me to continue with ROTC. Thank you ma’am 🥹

Late evening guys. I’m from CTU-MC, NSTP batch 2024-2025 President. Since many students are still confused about NSTP, here’s a quick overview:

LTS – trains students to teach literacy and numeracy (exclusive for Education students).
CWTS – focuses on community service (for non-Education students).
ROTC – military training for national defense.

Education students can also choose ROTC if they really want to. I encourage everyone to try ROTC because it’s fun 😄
- Kirk Pugnaria - PRESIDENT

Stop the confessions for a bit 😭 About the PE uniforms — why are some people overreacting and saying it looks like kindergarten uniforms? What’s the point of studying if you don’t even have PE uniforms? You guys are so dramatic 😭 Anonymous hehe.

Hello! I’d like to ask if anyone knows where I can buy an affordable arnis stick. I’m okay with second-hand ones too as long as they’re in good condition and have a case or bag. Please comment so I can message you. Thank you 🩷
– Educ sophomore student

Hi admin, I have something to confess. While I was walking along the road near CTU Main, I found a keychain with a key, an inhaler, and a cute little doll charm. I thought it must be really important to the owner since it has personal things attached to it. I just want to ask if anyone knows who owns this key because I’d really like to return it. Losing a key is not easy, especially if it’s for a house or locker. If this belongs to you, please reach out to me so I can give it back.

Hello admin, please give a shoutout to Kalianne Airelie Prieto if I got the name right. Hi ma’am, thank you so much for earlier at the canteen. My classmates and I were pooling our money for lunch and budgeting our fare home. You probably overheard us saying we didn’t have enough money, and instead of us skipping lunch, you approached us and gave each of us some money so we could eat. We are very thankful because you solved our hunger problem and we still had enough fare to get home. Thank you again ma’am. We forgot to thank you personally because you seemed to be in a hurry. You are very kind, down to earth, simple, and beautiful. – COT students

I saw a post about a missing umbrella in the library and it might be mine 🥲 I lost it maybe Thursday. At first I thought I misplaced it in the female restroom at the administration building 3rd floor, but I remembered bringing it to the library. When I looked for it there, I couldn’t find it anymore. I don’t usually take pictures of my things, but I bought it from Mr. DIY. It’s white outside and black inside, and it had something like sunblock attached. I also didn’t remove the price tag from the handle because it was stuck there. If anyone found it, please let me know. I’m a BAL-LAP student from the evening class.

Hi to the 2nd year electrical night mayor, Press Carmela. You laugh so loudly with your classmates but when you’re alone you don’t even notice me 😭 Whenever someone whistles or calls your name, it’s probably me, a first year student HAHAHA. Please notice me sometimes, your smile is so cute. You’re the reason I look forward to going to school every day, and when you ignore me I just want to cry hahaha. CTU Pinamungajan here!

To: Mariel. I never thought I’d fall in love. It was unexpected to feel something so strange—a powerful mix of affection, attraction, admiration, and longing for a deep connection. I never realized I’d constantly think about her, worry about her, and wonder where she is. Then I realized so many things. I really love her, and sometimes I get jealous of other guys around her. I wonder why, whenever I look at her, I feel proud of her character and the person she’ll become in the future. But it’s like the universe let me meet the girl of my dreams, yet the world won’t let me have her. At the end of the day, I know she’s going to be alright and still be happy, and so am I. – from the star of the sea

Good evening admin! Please post this about my friend who lost their school ID last Friday around 2 PM in ST Building Room 101. Please help us find it. If anyone happened to see it, kindly return it to Room 101 because that ID is really important and needed by my friend. If someone found it, please comment. Thank you admin if you happen to see this message 🥹

Hey good evening, please post this and keep me anonymous. To that class officer who kept acting arrogant during the SSG meeting two weeks ago—you keep showing your phone screen to other students and laughing at another student officer by calling them ‘Winnie the Pooh.’ You’re a pathetic person. We are not entertained by what you’re doing, and we’re definitely not impressed by your easily drained downgraded iPhone 🙄🙄🙄. Does bullying need to be reported directly to the dean or can it also be reported to SSG officers?

Hi admin, good afternoon. Please post this for awareness regarding trans women at CTU. This is about the rules saying trans women are no longer allowed to wear skirts and must tie their hair in a bun. It feels like inclusiveness is being taken away from us. It’s like we’re being excluded from womanhood and made to feel different from biological women even though the only difference is our bodies and cells lol.

Hello everyone, good evening! Do you need help with your academics? I’m open for service. I can do your essays and poems. Just DM me so we can negotiate the price, but I can assure you it’s affordable. Message me for the commission list.

Hi admin! Please post this. I just want to say hi to Ate Claire from karate. I have a crush on you 😣😣 I learned your name because of my friend who also joined karate. Hopefully someday we can interact if I don’t get too shy around you 🥺😭 – girl wearing purple
Hello good evening admin. I found a folded purple umbrella (not the automatic type with a button) at the EN building 3rd floor. If you’re the owner, just comment and I’ll message you 😊 – Mayora

To: Min from BSDC 1-1. Hi Min! You are the most gorgeous girl I’ve ever seen. It might sound cliché but it’s true. Whenever I see you, my mood instantly brightens. The way you look, the way you laugh, your smile—everything about you seems perfect. Next time I see you, I hope I’ll have the courage to talk to you :) From: secret

Please post this admin!! Is this really confirmed already??? Even with the memorandum, some professors still hold classes hahaha. I’m a first year student and one of our professors even conducted an online class. Is this really official? HWAHAHAHA
Good morning to my cute banana, Marjorie Sumayang. Take care during your OJT 🫶 – From sender

Hello admin, you can handle the thank you message to the girl who drew me because I don’t know her. I’m very thankful because I’m really insecure about myself, but apparently someone admires me. I appreciate the drawing she gave me even though I don’t know who made it mwhehee. – From sender
Hi good evening admin. Someone left a pink tumbler in room GS 206 around 9 PM tonight. If anyone finds it tomorrow, please comment. THANK YOUUU 💜 – From sender

I just want to express my disappointment toward CTU Argao Campus, especially the guards. Last Thursday while my friends and I were going home, a guard aggressively called us over. I got nervous because I thought something serious happened, but it was because my skirt uniform was supposedly too short. At first I understood because they were just doing their job, but what disappointed me was how they treated another girl they called out. One girl explained that she still couldn’t buy a new skirt because they were struggling financially, and the guard responded, ‘Find a way because next week you won’t be allowed inside anymore.’ While she was writing her name in the logbook, she explained that she had the same skirt since first year and had simply grown bigger. Then the male guard replied, ‘Then stop getting so fat.’ Those exact words. The girl just smiled, but I know she was hurt. Later outside the gate, I saw her crying while getting on a motorcycle. This behavior is unprofessional and hurtful. It doesn’t reflect the values of respect and inclusivity the university promotes. Every student deserves to feel safe and respected regardless of appearance or body type. I hope CTU Argao Campus addresses this issue.

Hi admin, please post this. Did anyone find a black wallet in the admin restroom? It has one 500 peso bill, one 100 peso bill, some coins, a picture, and a COR inside. If anyone found it, please return it huhuhu.

I don’t know where I found the courage to say this, but it has come to my attention that there’s a girl who keeps posting random clips of my boyfriend on her Facebook account for entertainment or reels. I don’t know if it’s intentional or just for fun, but I hope you know where to draw the line because I’m honestly uncomfortable with how often you post him. It’s already happened four times. My boyfriend is uncomfortable too and even considered approaching you. Please respect what you post because you don’t have his permission, and not everything should become content on your public account. We respect each other’s spaces and boundaries, so please respect his too. If you have feelings for him, then respect our relationship. I trust him completely, but I still have the right to confront this situation because he’s uncomfortable already. Please don’t hate me for this. And if you know me personally, let’s approach this properly. To everyone who knows someone is already in a relationship, please remember the importance of respect. Respect other people’s relationships and go for someone who’s single instead. – future lawyer

For everyone, this is just for student awareness. Around the CTU Jollibee area, especially when going home around 11 PM or midnight, please be careful because thieves are everywhere. We almost got robbed recently by two guys on a motorcycle waiting near Jollibee. If strangers approach you, don’t trust them easily, especially us students. To that guy, whoever you are, we’ll meet again someday. Good thing I immediately grabbed my phone and moved closer to my companion. Please stay safe everyone, this usually happens at night.

Hi admin, please hide my identity. I have a crush on someone and I kept stalking his Facebook after seeing his ID. His name is Junmark Oxima and he’s a BSMath student. I find him really handsome, especially because he always posts on Facebook and flexes his abs hehe. Every time I see your posts, I can’t help but get starstruck. I’m not just attracted to your abs but also your presence honestly. I really have a crush on you even though we’ve never talked. Somehow you already feel special to me. Hopefully someday I can meet and talk to you in person. BSMath guys are really handsome huh, smart in math and handsome too 😭

If possible, LET'S PRIORITIZE OUR SAFETY FIRST during today's calamity until further notice. Not everyone has the same privilege. Some may have gotten into accidents, while others went home to check on their families affected especially in the northern parts of Cebu and other affected areas due to the earthquake or related incidents. Let's ask ourselves: 'ARE WE SAFE?' 'ARE WE SECURE ENOUGH?' 'ARE OTHERS OKAY?' 'ARE WE CAPABLE ENOUGH TO CONTINUE DESPITE THE CALAMITY?' I hope this post helps us become more aware of what is happening around us today and encourages consideration for those who were affected. -Admin LOK

If CTU-Main has already been inspected, I hope the other CTU campuses will also have their buildings properly inspected. I've read comments and messages from students from other campuses regarding their concerns as well. I know the process takes time, but I hope these issues will also be addressed and resolved for the safety of students and professors during face-to-face classes. Stay safe everyone! We’ll recover together!

Permission to post, Admin. Hi everyone, I’m calling the attention of CTU personnel, faculty, and higher-ups to please double-check the Engineering Building. Even when dump trucks or heavy vehicles pass by, we can already feel strong vibrations. I know this has probably already been checked, but I’m posting this to help ensure our safety so that once we return to campus, we can feel secure without overthinking every vibration caused by heavy-duty vehicles. This isn’t to extend class suspensions but to raise a genuine safety concern for all engineering students, faculty, and everyone at CTU Main. I hope this can be thoroughly checked for everyone’s safety.

Please hide my identity. Hi admin, I just want to ask for tips on how to move on. She's my first girlfriend and probably my last. We recently broke up, and it’s been around 2–3 weeks since it happened, but she’s already entertaining someone else. Is it normal for women to move on that quickly, or am I just that easily replaceable? I feel hopeless because no matter what she does, a part of me is still stuck on her. From sender. -ur poging admin suu

Hello, I study at CTU MC and I’m a second-year student. I think it started when I first saw this guy during training. His smile is really something — like even when you're annoyed, once you see him smile, all your irritation disappears. As time went by, I kept seeing him more often. He’s no longer just a crush, I think I’ve already fallen in love with him. I hope you won’t get uncomfortable because I don’t really approach you much since I’m very shy around you. From sender. -ur poging admin suu

Hi Mhiko Macapobre from CTU-PC. I know this might sound unexpected — honestly, this is the first time in my life I’ve tried confessing like this HAHAHAHA. But I just wanted to be honest for once. You’ve really caught my attention since the first day I saw you, like a Taylor Swift love story. The way you smile, the way you talk, and the way you carry yourself — there’s just something about you that I can’t ignore no matter how much I try. Of course, you’re super cute especially when you smile. I don’t usually do things like this, but I figured it’s better to say something than keep wondering 'what if.' So I have to ask... are you already taken? 👀 Please answer. — We go to the same school.

Allow me to rant about my situation. I feel overwhelmed by the number of tasks our professors are giving us. Just today, our section received more than five tasks, and we still have old tasks from when classes were still face-to-face. The deadlines are back-to-back, so I don’t know what to prioritize anymore. It’s not just academics I have to handle because while I’m at home, I also have responsibilities and errands to do. I can’t help but feel like some professors are taking advantage of the situation since classes are asynchronous. I understand that I’m already in college and should work hard for a brighter future, but honestly, I’m struggling to balance school tasks and household responsibilities. I hope professors would also think about the situations of each student. I’m not complaining about being a student — I just wanted to let this out. Any tips on how to handle this? From sender. -ur poging admin suu

Hi, good evening admin! It’s me again, confessing my feelings to someone I know I have no chance with. Before I start, I just want to say that we’re close friends, but I’ll never confess because I don’t want to ruin our friendship and bond. At first, I thought my crush would fade over time, but as we spent more time together with our friend group, we became even closer. Our classmates would tease us, but I always denied it because our friendship meant more to me than my feelings. Every time he mentioned another girl, I secretly got hurt but kept it all to myself. Behind all the smiles and support I gave him, I was actually in pain. When our friendship reached three months, I slowly distanced myself because someone started getting jealous. As a girl, I thought it was better to step back than hurt someone else’s feelings. Until now, I still keep my feelings hidden. But I’m genuinely happy as long as he’s happy. I’m willing to let go, even if it hurts, just to see him smile. Written by: A first-year educator. Written for the person I love so much. Lesson learned: Don’t fall in love with someone who only sees you as a friend.

Hi miss turtleneck from Forestry Night with the purple glasses. I saw you during the earthquake drill earlier and you looked so cute. Your uniform suits you so well that I got butterflies. Honestly, it made me want to transfer to the night schedule just so I could see you more often. I’m still not confident enough to approach you on social media since we’re not Facebook friends, but I already know your name because I keep stalking your profile. I really want to get closer to you, but because of my hesitation, I can’t even send you a friend request. Hopefully someday we’ll become close. Thank you for being so cute — you’ve become my motivation. From: secret admirer (guess).

Hello everyone, I’m going to tell you a story — not to scare you, but to remind everyone to be careful about who you give rides to at night when going to school or work. Last month, my cousin was heading home from work around midnight. He travels a long distance from Consolacion to Guinsay on his motorcycle. When he reached Compostela, he saw an old man carrying many things asking for a ride. Since it was late and there were barely any vehicles around, he let the old man ride with him. After a while, my cousin looked at the side mirror and the old man was gone. Until now, I still get goosebumps hearing that story. My cousin sped away because he felt terrified and heavy all over. Then just last week, my cousin was on his way home again when he saw another old man asking for a ride. This time the old man had a scary face full of wounds. My cousin still let him ride because of what happened before, but he sped up due to fear. After a while, the old man whispered in his ear, 'Son, slow down. The last time I rode with you, I fell off.' HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA. So that’s why the old man’s face was wounded. That’s all, take care everyone!
CTU-MC: What is the process for dropping out? I am currently enrolled this first semester. May I ask how the process works? Also, is it possible to have my current year uncredited? Thank you.

Hello, I really made a dummy account just to express what I feel towards someone because my chest can’t handle it anymore HAHAHAHA. Anyway, I’m from CTU Argao and I have a newly found crush from Automotive. I first saw him on TikTok while he was live streaming. I requested to join and he accepted, and we had a short conversation there. When I stalked him more, I found out he’s also from Argao — what a coincidence. Fast forward to Monday during lunch time, my friends and I were eating at a store when he passed by, probably heading to their boarding house in Lamacan. My admiration for him got even stronger because he’s even cuter in person, especially when he smiles. I guess this will stay as a crush because I don’t think I’m pretty enough. Maybe he has high standards or maybe he already has a girlfriend — I hope not because I’d really get hurt HAHAHAHA. To that Automotive student, please don’t end our TikTok streak or I’ll cry. Mwah 😚 From sender.

I honestly feel so sad about what happened to Emman. I hope this serves as an eye-opener to everyone, especially those who are already in college and over 22 years old but still bullying others. Grow up, people. I still remember last April when my friend had a severe emotional breakdown that even triggered an asthma attack and uncontrollable shaking after being harassed by multiple dummy accounts on Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok. What’s worse is that they accused her of being behind the attacks herself, even though the evidence clearly showed who was responsible. To those girls who bullied our friend, I hope karma catches up with you soon. Imagine creating group chats just to ruin someone while she suffered alone. Be thankful her family didn’t pursue a complaint because they pitied your parents who work hard just to send you to school and help you graduate next year. The person you bullied wasn’t even from the same campus and was younger than all of you. What a shame. STOP BULLYING EVERYONE. From sender.

Good evening, CTUnians! We can all feel the aftershocks that continue to shake not only the land but also our hearts and minds. Many of us are wondering what will happen to our face-to-face midterms given the fear and trauma caused by these calamities. It’s difficult to focus on academics when we still seek peace and security first. Let’s continue praying and hoping that everything returns to normal soon. Let’s look out for one another and support each other. We don’t know what the future holds, so let’s face it together. Stay safe always, and God bless everyone! 💛 -Suu | CTU Confessions Admin

Hi, I just want to let out some sadness because as a first-year student here at CTU who is still adjusting to the environment and just finished midterms, I feel emotional. I’m an Educ student, and in one subject I got a grade of 2._ which is still passing, but I don’t know what to feel — sad, disappointed, but at the same time thankful that I passed. I know college is very different from high school. A part of me is happy because at least I passed. I know many students are also just trying hard to pass and avoid repeating subjects. So I’m very proud of my fellow first-year students and seniors who worked hard during midterms. May God bless you all. From: CTU-AC student.

I've been feeling so down and empty these days to the point where I don’t even remember why I’m sad, angry, or happy anymore. I feel like an empty bottle. I’ve been dealing with life-changing events such as losing my parents when I was still in high school. I didn’t know where to turn or where to go, but I kept walking the path I made for myself — to graduate and finish school. During senior high school, I excelled academically and graduated with honors. Now I’m in college taking the course I wanted and I passed the entrance exam and interview smoothly. I’m blessed to still have people supporting my education journey even though I no longer have my parents. Academically I’m still doing well, but mentally I don’t think so. I keep asking myself, 'Am I sane?' Sometimes I stare blankly without thoughts, forget things I just placed somewhere, panic suddenly, or get angry over small things. I no longer know if I truly love what I’m doing or if I’m just surviving through necessity. The truth is, I never gave myself time to mourn my parents because I was too afraid to show vulnerability. I’m always there for others, but I never let anyone see the real me because of fear. Being known as strong and independent makes people think you really are, even when you’re breaking inside. I’m exhausted. I’m too tired to keep going. Right now, I feel like I’m merely surviving, not living. From sender.

Lost School ID Notice. Good day everyone! I would like to ask for your assistance. I recently lost my CTU-Main school ID under the name Micaela A. Vidanes. I may have misplaced it within or near the school premises. If someone finds it, please message me through Facebook (Micaela Vidanes or Calea Arnoza). The ID is very important because it serves as proof of identity and campus access. Thank you very much and God bless you all! From sender.

Hi everyone. I’m posting this because I just want to express my feelings. Honestly, I’m at a point in life where I can’t see hope or a reason to move forward anymore. I feel empty and disappointed in myself. My mind is in chaos. I’m also worried about my health because my hair keeps falling out and becoming thinner, almost making me look bald on top. Sometimes I suddenly drop things I’m holding and I don’t know why. I lose my appetite even though I want to eat because I end up vomiting. I’m a first-year BSIS student, but honestly I don’t like my course anymore. Every time we have class, especially face-to-face, I feel mentally absent. I try to stop myself from crying in the middle of class, especially during major subjects. Even during online classes, I still feel drained. It’s affecting me emotionally and physically. Sometimes I only want to sleep, or sometimes I can’t sleep at all because I overthink everything. I already told my family I wanted to shift to Nursing, but they said it’s too expensive, which I understand because we have many bills and siblings studying too. I’m thankful I got into CTU, but I keep asking myself when I’ll finally feel okay if I continue this course. Every time we have classes, I feel like I can’t breathe. Even if I’m physically there, my mind is somewhere else. The discussions don’t sink in. I prefer studying alone. I feel so pressured that I don’t even know how to bring back my spark. I keep trying but end up doubting myself again. I lost motivation for everything, even things I used to love like public speaking. Now I feel anxious instead. I always make sure people around me don’t notice what I truly feel, but deep inside I’m breaking. I just want to be alone and I feel like nobody is really there for me. I have friends, but it still feels lonely. I never chose to feel this way. Every night I cry, and sometimes I feel completely numb. I’ve been thinking about working so I can save money and support my own studies if I shift courses, but I don’t know where to start. Is that the right decision? I’m posting this because I honestly don’t know what to do anymore. From sender.

Good morning admin, regards to Rithzel Edar. How are you? You don’t ride with me anymore. I had a very unexpected first year college experience. Everything was normal until it wasn’t. I met someone, but at first that was all there was to it. She was a friend of a friend and we met on the first day of school. We exchanged names, then glances, then greetings every time we passed by each other.

She was very pretty, admired by many people, and her voice was so cute. She was also unexpectedly a very cool person. She wasn’t like other girls. She was very sporty and loved to run. She was admired by both boys and girls. She was basically the best girl anyone could ask for. I had always admired her since we met, but that was all there was to it.

Then unexpectedly, I found out she liked me. I was shocked because I couldn’t believe someone like her could like someone as ordinary as me. My heart skipped a million beats. I never really paid attention to how I acted around her until I knew, and then I became very self-conscious.

The more I kept thinking about why she liked me, the more I realized that I liked her too. I didn’t plan it at all. My simple admiration suddenly grew into something much bigger. My heart skipped a beat every time I thought of her.

At some point, I think she also started noticing that I liked her. For months, all we had were short greetings, eye contact, butterflies, and excitement. I could hear her giggle after we interacted. We both smiled like we were secretly thrilled, or maybe I was just being delusional hahaha.

But because I was such a coward, that was all we could ever be. And now she’s with someone else. But I don’t regret it because I know she’s happier with someone who isn’t me. Okay bye.

Good morning, Admin and everyone. I'm a first-year college student (CAS-BAEL), though not from CTU Main, and I just want to share something that has been weighing heavily on me lately. I’m hoping to get advice and different perspectives.

I came from a broken family and live with my grandfather, who isn’t actually my blood relative. My three siblings and I live with him, and he has been taking care of us despite us being difficult sometimes. He has ongoing medical expenses, which I know are costly. He earns from his land, but I still worry about burdening him with my school expenses. Living in a mountainous area also makes transportation expensive. We have a motorcycle, but fuel still costs a lot, and our house is far from school. I feel guilty every time I ask him for money because he spends so much on us even though we’re not his biological grandchildren.

Recently, we had a big argument. After school on Monday, I was waiting for him and my sister near CTU. Some classmates, including male friends and one female friend, joined me. I had a toothache and fever that day and could barely speak because my head hurt so much from the heat.

When my grandfather arrived, he misunderstood the situation and got angry. He accused me of entertaining boys and using school pick-up as an excuse to meet them. He didn’t see my female friend because she had already left. This wasn’t the first time he accused me of something like that, and we had a huge fight because I answered back out of frustration. I understand that he’s protective and always reminds me to focus on studies and avoid relationships for the sake of my siblings and father.

It hurts because I feel like he thinks I’m following in my mother’s footsteps. She left us and never came back. She messages us sometimes, but we don’t reply because we’re still hurt. My father is in jail because of something he did for her out of love. He’s actually loving, caring, kind, and a true gentleman. I’ve always been closer to him than my mother. He used to work in a BPO company, and when I was younger, I thought we were a happy family. She cheated on him, and people used to say she could still end up with a rich man even with kids. She was a well-known model, and I was too young to understand what my father was going through.

All of this is making me want to stop schooling, but I don’t feel comfortable opening up to my professors. What should I do? Also, how can I retrieve important documents like my birth certificate? I would really appreciate any advice. Thank you, and I hope you post this anonymously.

Good morning, admin! Please hide my identity. I’m not from CTU Main, but I just want to use this page as an outlet for my unsaid feelings.

I truly believe that life, no matter how you define it, is a journey full of irony. Honestly, my college experience has been the perfect example of that.

As a gay person with zero romantic experience, I entered college craving new experiences. But the ones I’ve had so far have been full of twists I can only describe as ironic.

I usually get turned off by people who are far from my standards because this guy was very “genggeng,” and while there’s nothing wrong with that, it’s just not my preference. So I never expected anything. Yet here I am, feeling something I never thought I would.

It started with us just being close friends in the same circle. At first it was all jokes and fun to lighten the stress of our difficult program. But over time, he seemed extra caring toward me. There were acts of service, resting our heads on each other, hugs, calling each other “baby,” leaning on each other, and helping me academically.

At first, I didn’t think much about it. I just went with the flow and thought it was harmless playfulness. But eventually, flowers started growing in my chest and butterflies filled my stomach whenever he did something even slightly romantic.

Then I found out he already had a girlfriend. I didn’t know at first, so maybe everything he did really was just playful and I misunderstood it.

Lord, I prayed for romantic experiences, but I wish it was someone I could actually have.

I’ve been trying to detach myself for a month now, but it’s difficult because we’re classmates and in the same friend group. I’ve definitely fallen for him, but I’m trying to move on. Still, I’m grateful for the experience.

Growing up as a gay person, I became used to the idea that I might die single and that no guy would ever genuinely show me affection. But because of this experience, I realized that I am capable of being loved by someone, and that alone is enough.

We’re still friends now, just with boundaries. Slowly, I’m swallowing and hiding my feelings until they fade away. Love really feels like cannibalism when it grows in places where it shouldn’t.

What hurts more than the fact that he has a girlfriend is how hard it is to tone down my feelings while we’re still in the same friend group. But I’ll learn. Slowly, but I will.

Indeed, it’s tragic to love someone you cannot have. Hahaha.

Regarding the issue about SSG top officers, it is okay to post the top 15 hardworking or outstanding SSG officers to recognize their effort and contribution to the school. However, it is also okay for students to question and give their opinions. I understand there may be sarcasm and bias, but as student leaders, we are not exempt from scrutiny. Leadership in a school setting is not about comfort, it is about accountability. Recognizing the top 15 hardworking SSG officers is valid. Appreciation motivates people, and public recognition can inspire others to improve. Effort deserves to be seen. However, once something is posted publicly, especially in an official capacity, it becomes open to public reaction. That is part of a democratic space in a school community. Students questioning the criteria, transparency, or selection process should not automatically be seen as disrespectful. Constructive criticism is not an attack, it is participation. If the goal of student governance is representation, then feedback—positive or critical—is part of the system working. However, students also have responsibility. Opinions should be critical, not destructive. Sarcasm that turns into personal attacks shifts the issue away from accountability and into hostility. We can challenge decisions without degrading people. Also, an individual’s statement should not drag an entire organization unless it is officially released by that organization. Accountability should be individual, not collective without basis. Dragging a whole organization because of one member’s opinion only shifts attention away from the real issue and creates unnecessary division. At the end of the day, both sides have valid points. Recognition is fair. Questioning is fair. What matters is how it is handled. Student leaders should respond with transparency and maturity, while students should express concerns respectfully. In a school community, leadership and accountability should grow together, not compete against each other.
